pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh line 12 which inserts a dummy patient named 'Maria' 'Santos'.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh line 12 which inserts a dummy patient named 'Maria' 'Santos'.
Confirmed via task description and setup_task.sh which explicitly deletes any existing notes containing the value '6.8'.
Confirmed via task.json description which explicitly instructs the user to include 'Test Name (Hemoglobin A1c or HbA1c)'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires recording a synthetic Hemoglobin A1c lab result of 6.8% for a simulated patient named Maria Santos. The setup script manually inserts this patient into the FreeMED database if she doesn't exist and clears out previous notes containing '6.8'. There is no external dataset or case ID involved.
